You are one of "Die drei ???" (The Three Investigators) solving the mysterious "Call of the Trolls" case in Rocky Beach. Navigate through different locations, examine objects, talk to witnesses, and collect clues. Solve logical puzzles by combining evidence and deducing the truth. Your goal is to uncover who is behind the troll-themed threats and why. Progress through the story by solving puzzles that unlock new locations and advance the mystery.

Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and menu options | Space: Interact with highlighted hotspot/object, advance dialogue, confirm actions | Z: Open/close inventory, combine selected items | Shift: Examine selected inventory item for details | Enter: Start game from title screen | Esc: Pause/unpause game | R: Return to title screen
